sentences.target: Meine Schwester spielt in einer Band.

translations.de: Meine Schwester spielt in einer Band.
translations.en: My sister plays in a band.
translations.es: Mi hermana toca en una banda.
translations.fr: Ma sœur joue dans un groupe.
translations.it: Mia sorella suona in una band.
translations.pt: Minha irmã toca em uma banda.
translations.vi: Em gái tôi chơi trong một ban nhạc.
translations.nl: Mijn zus speelt in een band.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन एक बैंड में बजाती है.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου παίζει σε συγκρότημα.
translations.nb: Søsteren min spiller i et band.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya bermain di sebuah band.
translations.sv: Min syster spelar i ett band.
translations.da: Min søster spiller i et band.
translations.ja: 妹はバンドで演奏しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; agrees with a feminine nominative singular noun (Schwester); part of the subject NP.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; head of the subject.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular present indicative; predicates the clause and licenses the PP 'in einer Band'.
Preposition; here governs dative to express state/membership.
Indefinite article; feminine dative singular; determiner of 'Band'.
Common noun (loanword), not a proper name; feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'in' (music group sense).

translations.en: I like your band a lot.
translations.it: Mi piace molto la tua band.
translations.he: אני מאוד אוהב את הלהקה שלך.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích ban nhạc của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik vind jouw band erg leuk.
translations.hi: मुझे तुम्हारा बैंड बहुत पसंद है.
translations.pl: Bardzo podoba mi się twój zespół.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει πολύ το συγκρότημά σου.
translations.nb: Jeg liker bandet ditt veldig godt.
translations.sv: Jag gillar ditt band väldigt mycket.
translations.ro: Îmi place foarte mult trupa ta.
translations.cs: Tvoje kapela se mi moc líbí.
translations.da: Jeg kan rigtig godt lide dit band.
translations.ja: あなたのバンドが大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; 1st person singular present; expresses liking.
Possessive determiner; 2nd person singular; accusative feminine singular agreeing with 'Band'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'mag' (music group sense).
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate ('like very much').

sentences.target: Die Band spielt heute im kleinen Café.
sentences.reading: /diː bant ʃpiːlt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ɪm ˈklaɪ̯nən kaˈfeː./

translations.de: Die Band spielt heute im kleinen Café.
translations.ipa: /diː bant ʃpiːlt ˈhɔʏ̯tə ɪm ˈklaɪ̯nən kaˈfeː./
translations.en: The band is playing today at the small café.
translations.es: La banda toca hoy en el café pequeño.
translations.fr: Le groupe joue aujourd’hui dans le petit café.
translations.it: La band suona oggi nel piccolo caffè.
translations.ko: 그 밴드가 오늘 작은 카페에서 공연해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 乐队今天在小咖啡馆演出。
translations.yue: 樂隊今日喺細咖啡店演出。
translations.ru: Группа сегодня играет в маленьком кафе.
translations.pt: A banda toca hoje no pequeno café.
translations.he: הלהקה מנגנת היום בבית הקפה הקטן.
translations.vi: Ban nhạc diễn hôm nay ở quán cà phê nhỏ.
translations.ar: الفرقة تعزف اليوم في المقهى الصغير.
translations.nl: De band speelt vandaag in het kleine café.
translations.uk: Гурт сьогодні грає в маленькому кафе.
translations.hu: A zenekar ma a kis kávézóban játszik.
translations.hi: बैंड आज छोटे कैफ़े में बजा रहा है.
translations.pl: Zespół gra dziś w małej kawiarni.
translations.el: Το συγκρότημα παίζει σήμερα στη μικρή καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Bandet spiller i dag på den lille kafeen.
translations.id: Band itu tampil hari ini di kafe kecil.
translations.sv: Bandet spelar idag på det lilla kaféet.
translations.ro: Trupa cântă azi la cafeneaua mică.
translations.cs: Kapela dnes hraje v malé kavárně.
translations.da: Bandet spiller i dag på den lille café.
translations.ja: バンドは今日、小さなカフェで演奏します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject 'Band'.
Common noun; feminine nominative singular; subject (music group sense).
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular present indicative.
Temporal adverb; modifies the predicate.
Preposition; introduces a locative PP and governs dative.
Definite article; dative neuter singular; determiner of 'Café'.
Attributive adjective; dative neuter singular with weak inflection after definite article; modifies 'Café'.
Common noun; neuter dative singular; object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Ich suche eine Band für die Hochzeit.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈaɪ̯nə bant fyːɐ̯ diː ˈhɔxtsaɪ̯t./

translations.de: Ich suche eine Band für die Hochzeit.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzuːxə ˈaɪ̯nə bant fyːɐ̯ diː ˈhɔxtsaɪ̯t./
translations.en: I’m looking for a band for the wedding.
translations.es: Estoy buscando una banda para la boda.
translations.fr: Je cherche un groupe pour le mariage.
translations.it: Sto cercando una band per il matrimonio.
translations.yue: 我喺搵婚禮表演嘅樂隊。
translations.pt: Estou procurando uma banda para o casamento.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một ban nhạc cho đám cưới.
translations.ar: أنا أبحث عن فرقة لحفل الزفاف.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een band voor de bruiloft.
translations.hi: मैं शादी के लिए एक बैंड ढूँढ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter et band til bryllupet.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari band untuk pernikahan.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter ett band till bröllopet.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter et band til brylluppet.
translations.ja: 結婚式のためにバンドを探しています。

Common noun; feminine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für'.
